methods.name: User-Specific Iris Authentication
methods.description: Iris-based biometric authentication method that uses a genetic algorithm to select different iris features for each user to improve reliability.
sources: @inproceedings{qiUserSpecificIrisAuthentication2008, title = {User-{{Specific Iris Authentication Based}} on {{Feature Selection}}}, booktitle = {2008 {{International Conference}} on {{Computer Science}} and {{Software Engineering}}}, author = {Qi, Miao and Lu, Yinghua and Li, Jinsong and Li, Xiaolu and Kong, Jun}, year = {2008}, month = dec, volume = {1}, pages = {1040--1043}, doi = {10.1109/CSSE.2008.1060}}
